Ascend C matmul_sum_max_avg_pool_log_sum_exp_log_sum_exp kernel implementation
Please provide AscendC kernel examples for a fused matmul with bias followed by sequential reductions (sum, max, mean) and two logsumexp operations, including host tiling code and PyTorch binding templates.

Ascend C matmul_sum_max_avg_pool_log_sum_exp_log_sum_exp kernel implementation
Ascend C kernel example that fuses a linear layer with a sum-reduction across the output dimension to compute y[i] = sum_j sum_k x[i,k]*w[j,k] + sum_j b[j] without materializing the full [B,O] matmul output, using UB tiling over batch and features.
